meaning: adj.未到期的,(期限)未终止的
examples: How many valid and unexpired credit cards do you have now?
The ICL database stores a copy of each unexpired certificate that it has issued.
What is the credit limit in total of your currently valid and unexpired credit CARDS?
The winner of the election would serve the remainder of a senator's unexpired term.
He was the minority counsel to the Senate Watergate Committee before being elected to the Senate in 1994 to fill the unexpired term of Vice President Al Gore.
